archetype.name: Battle Harbinger
archetype.note: This archetype offers Bespell Strikes at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Bloodrager
archetype.note: This archetype offers Bespell Strikes at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Bespell Strikes
feat.requirement: Your most recent action was to cast a non-cantrip spell
feat.text:
You siphon spell energy into one weapon you’re wielding, or into one of your unarmed attacks, such as a fist. Until the end of your turn, the weapon or unarmed attack deals an extra 1d6 force damage and gains the associated trait (see below) if it didn’t have it already. If the spell dealt a different type of damage, the Strike deals this type of damage instead (or one type of your choice if the spell could deal multiple types of damage).  
  
**Oracle**: Your strike gains the divine trait.  
  
**Sorcerer:** Your strike gains the trait of your bloodline’s magical tradition.  
  
**Wizard**: Your strike gains the arcane trait.

traits.name: Oracle
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the oracle class.

traits.name: Sorcerer
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the sorcerer class.

traits.name: Wizard
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the wizard class.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
